pi_items.source: Task description in task.json explicitly requires creating a database named 'sakila_mart'.

Calculated the exact number of days from 2005-01-01 to 2006-12-31 inclusive. Neither 2005 nor 2006 is a leap year (365 + 365 = 730 days).
Parsed the SQL INSERT statements in the official Sakila dataset dump provided in the environment.

Executed a SQL grouping query on the Sakila rental and inventory tables by year, month, and store_id, yielding exactly 10 unique combinations.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the synthetic MySQL Sakila database. The exact number of days between 2005-01-01 and 2006-12-31 inclusive is 730, contrary to the claimed 731. The official Sakila dataset correctly contains 599 customers, 1000 films, 2 stores, and 16044 rental records. A view aggregating rentals by year, month, and store will produce exactly 10 rows.
